title: ELBO, Decomposed
tagline: Reconstruction vs KL — see exactly what each term costs you.
summary: The VAE objective is two terms: reconstruction NLL and KL to the prior. Train a tiny VAE on MNIST in the browser, watch the two bars race during training, slide β to favour one over the other. The classic β-VAE disentanglement vs reconstruction trade-off, made tactile.
highlights: Two live bars during training: reconstruction NLL and KL(q‖p).
Slide β from 0 (plain AE) through 1 (vanilla VAE) to 50 (high-disentanglement).
See the latent-space samples warp as β changes.
